ops.title: Block-type dispatch centralized in registry table
ops.body: Block-type dispatch is centralized in the spec registry table (internal/doc/registry.go): decode, validate, children traversal, and asset-src pointers per type. All block handling must route through this table — never add a new type-switch on concrete block types. Child recursion lives in Doc.Validate (not in the card spec closure) to avoid a Go initialization cycle; keep it there. Pack blocks (dotted types) plug into this same table via doc.PackTypes at the validation edges.
